docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2026 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-03-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF JUSTIN ZIPTON. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AMANDA ZIPTON. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT SALVADOR MARQUEZ JR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
